mapper.sql: SELECT m.id AS messageId, m.conversation_id AS conversationId, m.conversation_type AS conversationType, m.seq_no AS seqNo, m.client_msg_id AS clientMsgId, m.from_user_id AS fromUserId, m.to_user_id AS toUserId, m.group_id AS groupId, CASE m.msg_type WHEN 1 THEN 'TEXT' WHEN 2 THEN 'STICKER' WHEN 3 THEN 'IMAGE' WHEN 4 THEN 'GIF' WHEN 5 THEN 'FILE' WHEN 6 THEN 'SYSTEM' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS msgType, m.content AS content, m.extra_json AS extraJsonRaw, m.file_id AS fileId, m.send_status AS sendStatus, m.sent_at AS sentAt

FROM im_message m JOIN im_conversation_user cu ON cu.conversation_id = m.conversation_id JOIN im_conversation c ON c.id = m.conversation_id LEFT JOIN im_group_member gm ON c.conversation_type IN (2, 3) AND gm.group_id = c.biz_id AND gm.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM im_message m JOIN im_conversation_user cu ON cu.conversation_id = m.conversation_id JOIN im_conversation c ON c.id = m.conversation_id LEFT JOIN im_group_member gm ON c.conversation_type IN (2, 3) AND gm.group_id = c.biz_id AND gm.user_id = #{userId}
AND m.seq_no > #{afterSeq}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM im_message m JOIN im_conversation_user cu ON cu.conversation_id = m.conversation_id JOIN im_conversation c ON c.id = m.conversation_id LEFT JOIN im_group_member gm ON c.conversation_type = 2 AND gm.group_id = c.biz_id AND gm.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id, conversation_id AS conversationId, conversation_type AS conversationType, seq_no AS seqNo, client_msg_id AS clientMsgId, from_user_id AS fromUserId, to_user_id AS toUserId, group_id AS groupId, msg_type AS msgType, content, extra_json AS extraJson, file_id AS fileId, send_status AS sendStatus, sent_at AS sentAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM im_message WHERE from_user_id = #{fromUserId} AND client_msg_id = #{clientMsgId} LIMIT 1

SELECT m.id, m.conversation_id AS conversationId, m.conversation_type AS conversationType, m.seq_no AS seqNo, m.client_msg_id AS clientMsgId, m.from_user_id AS fromUserId, m.to_user_id AS toUserId, m.group_id AS groupId, m.msg_type AS msgType, m.content, m.extra_json AS extraJson, m.file_id AS fileId, m.send_status AS sendStatus, m.sent_at AS sentAt, m.created_at AS createdAt, m.updated_at AS updatedAt
WHERE m.id = #{messageId} AND cu.user_id = #{userId} AND cu.deleted = 0 AND c.status = 1 AND ( c.conversation_type NOT IN (2, 3) OR ( gm.id IS NOT NULL AND (gm.status = 1 OR m.seq_no <= cu.last_read_seq) ) ) LIMIT 1

SELECT m.id AS messageId, m.conversation_id AS conversationId, m.conversation_type AS conversationType, CASE WHEN c.conversation_type = 1 AND LEFT(c.biz_key, 6) = 'saved_' THEN c.conversation_name WHEN c.conversation_type = 1 THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(f.remark, ''), other_u.nickname, c.conversation_name) WHEN c.conversation_type IN (2, 3) THEN COALESCE(g.group_name, c.conversation_name) ELSE c.conversation_name END AS conversationName, CASE WHEN c.conversation_type = 1 AND LEFT(c.biz_key, 6) = 'saved_' THEN 'SAVED_MESSAGES' ELSE NULL END AS specialType, m.from_user_id AS fromUserId, sender.nickname AS senderName, CASE m.msg_type WHEN 2 THEN 'STICKER' WHEN 3 THEN 'IMAGE' WHEN 4 THEN 'GIF' WHEN 5 THEN 'FILE' WHEN 6 THEN 'SYSTEM' ELSE 'TEXT' END AS msgType, CASE WHEN m.msg_type = 2 THEN '[贴纸]' WHEN m.msg_type = 3 THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(m.content, ''), '[图片]') WHEN m.msg_type = 4 THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(m.content, ''), '[GIF]') WHEN m.msg_type = 5 THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(m.content, ''), '[文件]') ELSE m.content END AS preview, m.sent_at AS sentAt, cu.is_archived AS archived FROM im_message m JOIN im_conversation c ON c.id = m.conversation_id JOIN im_conversation_user cu ON cu.conversation_id = c.id AND cu.user_id = #{userId} AND cu.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN im_group_member gm ON c.conversation_type IN (2, 3) AND gm.group_id = c.biz_id AND gm.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN im_conversation_user other_cu ON c.conversation_type = 1 AND other_cu.conversation_id = c.id AND other_cu.user_id != #{userId} LEFT JOIN im_user other_u ON other_u.id = other_cu.user_id LEFT JOIN im_friend f ON f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.friend_user_id = other_u.id LEFT JOIN im_group g ON c.conversation_type IN (2, 3) AND g.id = c.biz_id LEFT JOIN im_user sender ON sender.id = m.from_user_id WHERE c.status = 1 AND m.send_status != 3 AND m.content IS NOT NULL AND m.content != '' AND m.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND ( c.conversation_type NOT IN (2, 3) OR ( gm.id IS NOT NULL AND (gm.status = 1 OR m.seq_no <= cu.last_read_seq) ) ) ORDER BY m.sent_at DESC, m.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
